=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 4/22/03, Houston, Texas, Verizon Wireless Theater

Lineage and taper: no info
Great sound

CD1

1 intro, 2 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 3 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano, Larry on mandolin), 4 Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano), 5Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on mandolin), 6 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano), 7 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on mandolin), 8 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp and electric), 9 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic), 10 Blind Willie McTell (Bob on piano and electric, Larry on cittern),

CD2

1 Dignity (Bob on piano), 2 Moonlight (Bob on piano and harp, Tony on standup bass), 3 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 4 Standing In The Doorway (Bob on piano), 5 intro, 6 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), (encore), 7 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 8 All Along the watctiower

Concert # 1505 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 4 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 15.
Concert # 4 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

1-6, 9-16 Bob Dylan (piano).
2, 4, 6 Larry Campbell (mandolin).
4, 6, 7, 11 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
7, 8 Bob Dylan (guitar).
8 acoustic with the band.
9 Larry Campbell (cittern).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

7 new songs (43%) compared to previous concert. 3 new songs for this tour.
